chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-1143 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on M.A No.2833/2026 (U/A) 2. For order on M.A No.2834/2026 (Return of surety) 13.04.2026 Applicant/surety is present in person Mr.Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, Assistant.P.G present in Court in other matters waives notice ********* 1. Granted. 2. Through this application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. It appears that vide Order dated 31.10.2022, the applicant/accused Ghulam Fareed was granted ad-interim pre-arrest bail by this Court and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. Thereafter, vide Order dated 25.11.2022, the interim bail granted to the applicant/accused was confirmed on the same terms and conditions and subsequently vide Order dated 19.11.2025, the applicant/accused was acquitted of the charge by the learned trial Court, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. Learned A.P.G after going through the record, tendered his no objection for release of surety. In view of above, listed application stands disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
